mapper.select: SELECT id, oauth_provider AS provider, oauth_provider_id AS providerId, oauth_nickname AS oauthNickname, oauth_email AS oauthEmail, oauth_profile_image AS oauthProfileImage, oauth_age_range AS oauthAgeRange, service_nickname AS nickname, user_role AS userRole, user_status AS userStatus, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM site_users WHERE oauth_provider = #{provider} AND oauth_provider_id = #{providerId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_users ( oauth_provider, oauth_provider_id, oauth_nickname, oauth_email, oauth_profile_image, oauth_age_range, service_nickname, user_role, user_status, created_at, last_login_at ) VALUES ( #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{oauthNickname}, #{oauthEmail}, #{oauthProfileImage}, #{oauthAgeRange}, #{nickname}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, oauth_provider AS provider, oauth_provider_id AS providerId, oauth_nickname AS oauthNickname, oauth_email AS oauthEmail, oauth_profile_image AS oauthProfileImage, oauth_age_range AS oauthAgeRange, service_nickname AS nickname, user_role AS userRole, user_status AS userStatus, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM site_users WHERE id = #{id}
